text: Codex APP 本身也很顶，超好用

There is also too much focus on two issues in discussions of paper reviewing: hallucinations & privacy.

Hallucinations are not gone, but the latest models rarely hallucinate sources (& it is relatively easy to make the human responsible)

And you can get IP compliance easily now https://t.co/o5N7LR63w5

Tested out the new Grok Imagine video model ✨

The speech, sound, and lip sync upgrades are really impressive. 

It works with lots of face angles, multiple speakers, pets - and the prompt adherence is quite strong.

A few clips I generated this morning (all one shots) 👇 https://t.co/XVcRjQyEsB
